blockingIssues.description: SSE emission coverage is incomplete: employee mutations outside employeeController (e.g. headcount approval materialization and scheduled-change application) do not emit realtime events, so cross-tab synchronization is incomplete.
Failed assistant turns can persist with empty content and are forwarded in history on follow-up queries; server validation rejects empty history content, breaking continued conversation flows.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit exception for SSE auth handling where routes intentionally authenticate in-controller instead of the standard auth middleware pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md currently states all protected routes use auth middleware, but sseRoutes intentionally bypasses route-level auth and authenticates inside the controller.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update implementation-worker skill guidance to avoid stale hardcoded baseline-failure counts; point to a maintained source-of-truth for known baseline failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review observed skill guidance with stale baseline failure counts, causing unnecessary validation churn and extra manual confirmation steps.

rejectedObservations.observation: Refresh .factory/library/architecture.md with the AI planning endpoint/panel/store flow.
